title: New RFTools Textures
description: Use the new RFTools textures made by MechWarrior99 in versions of RFTools 3.21 or older.
body:
# New RFTools Textures

![Screenshot showing the new RFTools textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FttkinSY/images/fbee7eb98143657fdf350647950632749b875f52.png)

This resource pack adds the new RFTools textures to older versions.
